title: neotinea tridentata subsp. conica
intro: Neotinea tridentata subsp. conica is a subspecies of the Neotinea tridentata orchid, commonly known as the dwarf helleborine, a type of terrestrial orchid. This plant has been used in traditional medicine, particularly in Europe, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Neotinea tridentata subsp. conica include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, and its ability to act as an antiseptic to prevent infections. The herbal preparations of Neotinea tridentata subsp. conica typically involve drying and grinding the plant into a powder, which can be used in teas, infusions, and poultices for its medicinal properties.
